domain: Persian badgir wind-catcher (Yazd, Kerman 14th c.+): 4-direction wind-vent oriented to seasonal prevailing winds; per-direction shaft depth tuned to wind speed; cooling via evaporation chambers below; roof-membrane thermal anchor; seasonal re-calibration of vents.
specific_mechanism: BADGIR-4-DIR-SHAFT-EVAP-ROOF-SEASONAL: (1) B_4dir 4-direction wind-vent; (2) D_shaft per-direction shaft depth; (3) E_evap cooling-evaporation passage; (4) M_anchor roof-membrane thermal anchor; (5) C_seasonal seasonal calibration.
llm_application: BADGIR mechanism + B_4dir + D_shaft + E_evap + M_anchor + C_seasonal. Differs from R585/R510/R523/R535/R548/R560/R573. Differs from windcatcher cooling literature by 4-direction + shaft depth + evap + anchor + seasonal LLM-application context.
novelty_claim: Basin-stability lit broad. BADGIR adds 5-mechanism composite. K=5.
